mapper.delete: delete from tfp_maintain_team_info where PROVINCE_ID=${provinceId} and MTEAM_ID =${mteamId}
mapper.select: select id status ,txt text from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001
select distinct province_id status,province_name text from region_city
SELECT id , txt , txt_en FROM tia_alarm_dict WHERE type=1037068 AND txt NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT DIMENSIONS from tfp_maintain_team_info WHERE PROVINCE_ID = ${provinceId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tfp_maintain_team_info ( PROVINCE_ID , MTEAM_ID, MTEAM_NAME, PROFESSIONAL_ID, professional_name, DIMENSIONS, ALARMS_FIELDS_COND, RELATED_RULE_ID, CREATE_TIME, OWNER_ID ) VALUES ( ${provinceId} , ${mteamId}, '${mteamName}', ${professionalId}, '${professionalName}', '${dimensions}', '${alarmFiledsCond}', ${relatedRuledId}, sysdate(), ${userId} )
mapper.update: Update tfp_maintain_team_info set MTEAM_NAME = '${mteamName}', PROFESSIONAL_ID = ${professionalId}, professional_name = '${professionalName}' , DIMENSIONS = '${dimensions}', ALARMS_FIELDS_COND = '${alarmFiledsCond}' , RELATED_RULE_ID = ${relatedRuledId}, LATEST_TIME = sysdate(), MODIFY_USER_ID = ${userId} where PROVINCE_ID = ${provinceId} and MTEAM_ID = ${mteamId}
mapper.select: select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001
mapper.update: update tfa_alarmresourcebyeoms set accept_id="${acceptId}", accept_name="${acceptName}", accept_dept_id="${acceptDeptId}", accept_dept_name="${acceptDeptName}", accept_tel="${acceptTel}", accept_night_id="${acceptNightId}", accept_night_name="${acceptNightName}", accept_night_dept_id="${acceptNightDeptId}", accept_night_dept_name="${acceptNightDeptName}", accept_night_tel="${acceptNightTel}", agent_id="${agentId}", agent_name="${agentName}", agent_dept_id="${agentDeptId}", agent_dept_name="${agentDeptName}", agent_tel="${agentTel}", copy_id="${copyId}", copy_name="${copyName}", copy_dept_id="${copyDeptId}", copy_dept_name="${copyDeptName}", copy_tel="${copyTel}", sms_id="${smsId}", sms_name="${smsName}", sms_dept_id="${smsDeptId}", sms_dept_name="${smsDeptName}", sms_tel="${smsTel}", child_id="${childId}", child_name="${childName}", child_dept_id="${childDeptId}", child_dept_name="${childDeptName}", child_tel="${childTel}", audit_id="${auditId}", audit_name="${auditName}", audit_dept_id="${auditDeptId}", audit_dept_name="${auditDeptName}", audit_tel="${auditTel}" where unique_rdn="${uniqueRdn}"
mapper.select:
select id,txt,type from tia_alarm_dict where valid = 1
and type in (${type})
